body.title: Define basket schema — fields, defaults, write-back contract, __status__
body.result: Basket schema defined (D216): basket = traversal context (traversal_contexts table). Reserved keys __status__ (running/complete/error/timeout/halted/branched), __error__, __init__. Standard inputs: input, node_id, trigger_type. basket_schema metadata key for field defaults, merged before step 1. Write-back ephemeral-only. schema_runner.py updated: __status__ written at init (running), completion (complete), error (error+__error__), timeout. Backwards compat with ctx_init preserved.
body.description: Basket schema definition: fields, defaults, write-back contract, __status__ field. #339
